name: ai-shield-server
description: Insider Guard — real UEBA insider-threat detection backend (Node + Express + SQLite). Baseline computed per-user from history.

env.INGEST_TOKEN: Optional. When set, POST /api/ingest requires `Authorization: Bearer <INGEST_TOKEN>` (else 401). Only an authenticated upload may become the global-active dataset; anonymous uploads are ingested but kept INACTIVE so the seed corpus stays untouched. Unset = local/dev: uploads allowed, but still never deactivate the seed.
env.RATE_LIMIT_MAX: Optional. Max /api requests per window per IP. Default 100.
env.RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS: Optional. Rate-limit window in ms. Default 900000 (15 min). GET /api/health is exempt.
env.INGEST_DOC: See server/routes/ingest.routes.js header for full auth/activation semantics.
